data.title: Coinbase tightens security after North Korean threat, mandates U.S. citizenship for sensitive roles
data.description:
Coinbase is changing its rules. After discovering that North Korean tech workers tried to use the company’s remote work policy to gain access to internal systems, the crypto exchange is locking things down. CEO Brian Armstrong said during a new episode of Stripe president John Collison’s podcast “Cheeky Pint” that the threats are real and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-tightens-security-korean-threat/

data.title: Philippines HB 421 files to establish a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve
data.description:
A Philippine lawmaker has filed a bill in the Philippines’ Lower House asking the government to establish a government-run Bitcoin reserve. The proposed legislation, labelled the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act, was introduced in congressional session on Friday. House Committee on Information and Communications Technology chairperson and Camarines Sur Representative Migz Villafuerte tabled House Bill 421, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/philippines-hb-421-files-for-bitcoin-reserve/

data.title: Taiwan Charges 14 in Record-Breaking $75M Crypto Laundering Case Using CoinW Exchange
data.description:
Taiwan prosecutors indicted 14 people in the country's largest cryptocurrency money laundering scheme worth NT$2. 3 billion ($75M) as Shilin District Prosecutor's Office concluded investigation into fraud ring that operated through fake Coin Exchange franchises using CoinW brand, victimizing over 1,500 people in one year.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/taiwan-charges-14-in-record-breaking-75m-crypto-laundering-case-using-coinw-exchange/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 116,000 USDT with a 2.59% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Aug 22, 2025, 14:41 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 116,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 116,010.023438 USDT, with a narrowed 2.59% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Fed chair Jerome Powell says he is open to cutting interest rates in September
data.description:
Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell said Friday that the central bank might lower interest rates as soon as September, citing rising economic risks and ongoing uncertainty. Speaking at the Fed’s yearly gathering in Jackson Hole, Wyoming, Powell delivered a cautious but clear signal that the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) is considering easing monetary policy […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/powell-will-cut-interest-rates-in-september/

data.title: SharpLink Gaming Launches $1.5 Billion Stock Buyback Program, Reinforcing Ethereum-Centric Treasury Strategy
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming has authorized a $1. 5 billion stock buyback as it reinforces its Ethereum-first treasury strategy with more than 740,000 ETH worth over $3 billion.

The post SharpLink Gaming Launches $1. 5 Billion Stock Buyback Program, Reinforcing Ethereum-Centric Treasury Strategy first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/08/22/sharplink-gaming-1-5-b-stock-buyback/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=sharplink-gaming-1-5-b-stock-buyback

data.title: Trump Threatens to Dismiss Federal Reserve Governor Cook
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that he will dismiss Federal Reserve Governor Cook if she does not resign. This announcement underscores ongoing tensions between the Trump administration and the Federal Reserve. The President's remarks highlight his dissatisfaction with the current monetary policy direction and his willingness to take decisive action to influence it.

data.title: Powell's Dovish Remarks Trigger Market Surge
data.description: According to Foresight News, recent comments by U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, perceived as dovish, have sparked a market rally. This surge has led to a significant increase in the unrealized gains of a particular trader's long position, now amounting to $3.01 million. The realization of these profits will depend on the trader's timing in selling the position.
